Controller Tuning Suite Report

Results are grouped by trajectory first and optimizer second. Each comparison table shows start vs best integral metrics and percentage change. Positive percentages mean improvement vs start, negative percentages mean regression vs start. The detailed sections keep parameter sets and before/after trajectory plots together. Plan: controllers=[], traj_ids=[].
